description: Style Notespykar's Summer Fest line comes up with all the trending styles this season. This top is a warm weather essential - style it over a white shirt or under a black blazer and look great either way. Product DetailsPurple polo T-shirt, has a ribbed spread collar, a half buttoned placket, embroidery on the left chest, short sleeves and buttons at the hem side ventsMaterial and Care100% cottonHand wash coldFlat dry in shadeWarm ironSize and FitRegular FitThe model (height 5'8" and chest 33) is wearing a size M
